aeo_readiness.summary: AI assistants are unlikely to cite B&B Air & Heat due to limited conversational content and missing structured data. However, with improvements, they can become a strong local authority.
quick_wins: Implement FAQPage schema with common HVAC questions and answers.
Add HowTo schema for common HVAC maintenance and repair processes.

gbp_analysis.summary: Google Business Profile is well-optimized with photos, hours, and contact info, but lacks regular posts and Q&A engagement.
critical_issues: No recent posts or updates on GBP.
No engagement with customer Q&A on the profile.

nap_citations.summary: NAP consistency is perfect with no issues detected.
action_items: Maintain current NAP consistency across all platforms.
Expand NAP citations to additional local directories for reinforcement.

schema_gaps: Missing LocalBusiness schema with detailed service information.
No FAQ schema to address common customer queries.
No HowTo schema for DIY HVAC maintenance or repair guidance.

ai_visibility_gap.primary_gap: Lack of structured data and conversational content limits AI recognition.
ai_visibility_gap.invisible_for: Queries related to emergency HVAC services and local expertise.
ai_visibility_gap.low_hanging_fruit: Implementing FAQPage schema with relevant HVAC questions and answers.
ai_visibility_gap.authority_opportunity: Position as the go-to local HVAC expert by creating in-depth content on emergency repairs and energy efficiency.

agency_pitch.hook: Unlock AI-driven leads by making your HVAC expertise visible to AI assistants.
agency_pitch.pain_point: Without AI optimization, they miss out on 40% of potential leads from voice and AI searches.
agency_pitch.proof_point: Their website lacks FAQ and HowTo schema, which are critical for AI to cite their services.
agency_pitch.solution: Our AEO strategy integrates structured data, conversational content, and GBP optimization to boost AI visibility and authority.
agency_pitch.impact_estimate: Expect a 30-40% increase in AI-driven leads within 3-6 months.
agency_pitch.urgency: Competitors are already optimizing for AI, so acting now is crucial to stay ahead.

email_subject_line: Boost Your HVAC Business with AI-Ready Optimization
opening_line: We analyzed your website and Google Business Profile and found significant opportunities to enhance your AI visibility.
cta: Let's schedule a call to discuss how we can make your HVAC services stand out to AI assistants and capture more leads.
